creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I had a little more time this afternoon so I ran the test with the newest version of pkg (pkg-1.19.1_1) and there now it works as expected with pkg-provides
plugin installed and configured.

So basically the issue was introduces by the latest changes on pkg port
regarding the PIC options. This new option is now disabled by default.

For peoples with pkg 1.19.1 (check pkg info, pkg --version if wrong), you can fix the issue by updating your packages (as soon of the latest version of pkg will be available) or build your own using poudriere.

Since the issue was caused by pkg, not pkg provides, this PR has top be closed with the "work as intended" reason.

Thanks for your time & support
-- rodrigo
